series_metadata.series_title: Summary of Collateral Sufficiency Report & supporting documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Final two pages of Collateral Sufficiency Report (see SEC-604a) are printed each day. These pages of the report list whether or not execution of computer formulas found collateral deficiencies at any of the depository banks, and identifies any such deficiencies. Supporting documentation showing resolution of any identified deficiencies is attached.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: conclusion of fiscal year in which report was generated, an additional 4 fiscal years. ; Electronic: conclusion of fiscal year in which report was generated, an additional 4 fiscal years
